news.headline: Fun88 India marks 4th anniversary with ₹4 Crore giveaway to players, celebrating milestone with exciting promotion.
news.summary: In Hyderabad, India, on August 9, 2024, Fun88, a top online gaming and betting platform, is marking its 4th anniversary with an exciting promotion. Players have the opportunity to win a cash prize of ₹4 Crore. To commemorate this milestone, Fun88 welcomes all players to participate in...

news.headline: Global spandex market set to reach $21.9B by 2034, growing at CAGR of 8.1%. Key numbers: $10B revenue in 2024, USA market $1.2B, China 53.4% market share.
news.summary: The global spandex market is set to reach a revenue of US$10 billion in 2024, with projections to grow to US$21.9 billion by the end of 2034 at a CAGR of 8.1% between 2024 and 2034. The growth in the market is attributed to the increasing use of spandex fibers in medical textiles, compression garments, sportswear, activewear, socks, incontinence products, and diapers. The US market is expected to reach US$1.2 billion in 2024, while China is forecasted to hold 53.4% market share in East Asia with Japan's market projected to be valued at US$600 million in the same year. Overall, the East Asia market for spandex is anticipated to expand significantly.

news.headline: Global auto antenna market to hit $14.2B by 2033, growing at 4.5% CAGR, driven by connectivity demand and tech advances.
news.summary: The worldwide market for car antennas is on the rise, driven by various factors including increasing demand for connectivity, higher adoption rates of autonomous and electric vehicles, and advancements in technology. As of August 9, 2024, this growth trend was observed in a report by Allied Market Research based in Portland, Oregon.

news.headline: Bybit and BlockScholes release report. Crypto market volatility decreases, suggesting worst sell-off may be over.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Dubai, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, Bybit, has collaborated with BlockScholes to unveil its newest Crypto Derivatives Analytics Report. The report indicates that Option Volatility suggests the possibility that the unfavorable conditions may have begun to improve.

news.headline: Laer AI introduces Depose within Aida Discovery, enhancing deposition prep, appearances, and analysis for litigation teams.
news.summary: Deposition Preparation, Appearances, and Analysis for litigators get big boost from new tool, Depose. Developed by Laer AI, creators of Aida Discovery, this AI technology aims to streamline deposition processes by consolidating all case-related information. The launch of Depose on Aug. 9, 2024, marks a significant advancement in litigation support, promising to revolutionize how legal teams handle depositions.

news.headline: Assaí Atacadista reports strong results, closes first half of 2024 with R$35.1 billion in net sales, up 12.9% YoY.
news.summary: In São Paulo, as of August 9, 2024, Assaí Atacadista (ASAI), a prominent cash and carry chain in Brazil, reported net sales of BRL 35.1 billion for the first half of 2024. This marked a 12.9% annual growth compared to the same period last year and an extra BRL 4 billion compared to the latter half of 2023.

news.headline: Sampco Companies acquire Pak-It Displays, LLC, a leading PoP display company based in Bensalem, PA.
news.summary: Sampco Inc., based in Pittsfield, Massachusetts, revealed the acquisition of Pak-it Displays, LLC, a prominent privately owned point of purchase display company situated in Bensalem, Pennsylvania. The acquisition marks a significant move for Sampco Inc. as it looks to expand its presence in the market. This acquisition is set to strengthen Sampco Inc.'s position in the industry, providing new opportunities for growth and development. The exact financial details of the deal remain undisclosed, but sources indicate that it is a substantial investment aiming to boost Sampco Inc.'s market share and enhance its product offerings.

news.headline: Birmingham Legion FC completes construction on new training facility; grand opening ceremony on August x.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama on August 9, 2024, Birmingham Legion FC has successfully finished the construction of its state-of-the-art training facility. The club is set to commemorate the completion of this significant project with a ribbon-cutting ceremony on Thursday, August [date].

news.headline: Big Tree Cloud Holdings Limited notified on Nasdaq minimum market value deficiency. Specializes in personal care products in China.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Shenzhen, China, Big Tree Cloud Holdings Limited, a company specializing in personal care products and consumer goods in China, disclosed it received a written notification. This company is dedicated to developing, producing, and selling personal care products and other consumer goods in the region.

news.headline: ChipMOS reports 12.4% YoY growth in July 2024 revenue, up 7.6% MoM.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Hsinchu, ChipMOS TECHNOLOGIES INC. (8150: Taiwan Stock Exchange, IMOS: Nasdaq), a prominent outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services provider, released its unaudited consolidated financial report.

news.headline: Weekly recap: Highlights include Fortune Global 500 list, new collectibles from McDonald's, & eco-friendly disinfecting wipes from Clorox.
news.summary: This week, PR Newswire highlighted several key press releases. Among them were updates on the Fortune Global 500 list, revealing the top companies in the world. McDonald's announced the launch of new collectibles, appealing to fans and consumers. Clorox introduced their latest product, eco-friendly disinfecting wipes, catering to the growing demand for sustainable cleaning solutions. The news came out of New York on August 9, 2024, with a surge in press releases being published regularly, showcasing various industries and innovations.

news.headline: American Strategic Investment Co. (NYSE: NYC) reports stable $15.8 million revenue in Q2 2024, with $91.9 million net loss.
news.summary: In New York, American Strategic Investment Co. (NYSE: NYC) shared its financial update for the second quarter of 2024. The company, owning a commercial real estate portfolio in NYC, reported steady revenue of $15.8 million in Q2 2024 compared to the same period in 2023. However, there was a significant increase in net loss attributable to common stockholders, reaching $91.9 million in Q2 2024, a notable jump from $10.9 million in the previous year.

news.headline: Magna rejects TRC Capital's mini-tender offer for 2 million shares at CDN $57.90 each, below market price by 4.49%.
news.summary: Magna International Inc. received an unsolicited mini-tender offer from TRC Capital Investment Corporation to purchase up to 2,000,000 Magna Common Shares at a price of CDN $57.90 per share, which is 4.49% lower than the closing price on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) on July 29, 2024. The offer, representing less than 1% of Magna's outstanding Common Shares, is conditional and TRC Capital may withdraw if the market price falls below CDN $57.58. The offer is also not fully funded and is subject to receiving necessary financing on terms deemed reasonable by TRC Capital.

news.headline: Todd Magazine steps down as CEO of AirSculpt Technologies, Dennis Dean named interim CEO. Magazine to advise until Dec 31.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Miami Beach, Florida, AirSculpt Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIRS), a leading provider of body contouring procedures, made a significant announcement. Todd Magazine has resigned from his position as Chief Executive Officer and as a member of the Board of Directors. Mr. Magazine will continue as an advisor to the company until December 31, 2024. Dennis Dean, the Chief Financial Officer, has taken on the role of interim Chief Executive Officer until a permanent replacement is appointed.

news.headline: Embecta Corp. declares $0.15 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on Sept. 13, 2024 to shareholders as of Aug. 27.
news.summary: Embecta Corp. announced on August 9, 2024, that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per share for its common stock (Nasdaq: EMBC). The dividend will be distributed on September 13, 2024, to shareholders recorded as of the close of business on August 27, 2024.

news.headline: Gravity Co., Ltd. releases Q2 2024 results with unaudited financials, ending June 30. NasdaqGM: GRVY.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, South Korean company GRAVITY Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY) shared its unaudited financial results for the second quarter ending June 30, 2024. As a prominent developer and publisher of online and mobile games headquartered in Seoul, Gravity reported these figures following International Financial Reporting Standards set by the International Accounting Standards Board. The company's announcement included financial data and business updates.

news.headline: 36Kr Holdings Inc. announces CFO & board changes in China. Lin Wei resigns, Xiang Li appointed.
news.summary: Beijing, August 9, 2024 - Today, 36Kr Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: KRKR), a leading brand and platform catering to New Economy participants in China, disclosed the resignation of Ms. Lin Wei from her positions as Chief Financial Officer and Board of Directors member for personal reasons, effective August 9, 2024. The company has swiftly appointed Mr. Xiang Li as the new Chief Financial Officer and director, with immediate effect.

news.headline: Emera Inc. reported Q2 2024 net income per share increase to $0.45, from $0.10 in Q2 2023, driven by LIL sale. Adjusted EPS decreased to $0.53.
news.summary: Today, Emera Inc. announced their financial results for the second quarter and year-to-date of 2024 in Halifax, Nova Scotia. The reported net income per share ("EPS") showed significant growth, with a rise from $0.10 in Q2 2023 to $0.45 in Q2 2024, marking an increase of $0.35. This increase was primarily attributed to a gain from the strategic sale of the Labrador Island Link ("LIL"). On the other hand, the adjusted EPS saw a decrease of $0.07 to $0.53 compared to the previous period.

news.headline: FREYR Battery Inc. (NYSE: FREY) reports Q2 2024 results, aiming for revenue & EBITDA in 2025. Priority is on financeable projects.
news.summary: NYC & OSLO, Norway & NEWNAN, Ga.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FREYR Battery, Inc. (NYSE: FREY) disclosed financial performance for Q2 of 2024. The report highlights the company's efforts under a new Board of Directors and leadership to generate first revenues and EBITDA by 2025. Emphasis is on allocating resources towards financeable projects and inorganic opportunities to hasten FREYR's progress.

news.headline: Li-Cycle appoints Marcum Canada LLP as independent auditor (NYSE: LICY), global lithium-ion battery company.
news.summary: Li-Cycle Holdings Corp. (NYSE: LICY) based in Toronto, has disclosed that the Audit Committee of its Board of Directors has given the green light to Marcum Canada LLP to serve as its independent registered public accounting firm. The appointment of Marcum was approved unanimously and will serve as the Company's independent auditor. This decision comes after thorough consideration by the Board of Directors. Li-Cycle is a renowned global lithium-ion battery resource recovery firm.

news.headline: NHC reports Q2 2024 earnings of $300.7M, up 6.4% from Q2 2023. Excluding certain income sources.
news.summary: NHC, a leading senior healthcare company listed on NYSE American as NHC, disclosed its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2024. The company reported total net operating revenues and grant income of $300,658,000 for this period. This marked a substantial increase of 6.4% compared to the same quarter in the previous year, which stood at $282,582,000. Notably, these figures exclude any governmental stimulus income, supplemental Medicaid payments from different states, and the contribution from three skilled nursing facilities.

news.headline: Anaergia Inc. reports Q2 2024 financial results in Ontario, with revenue of $100M and profits up by 15%.
news.summary: In Burlington, Ontario, Anaergia Inc. (TSX: ANRG) released its financial results for the three- and six-month periods ending on June 30, 2024. These results were detailed in the related management's discussion and analysis. The highlights from the report include various key points. All financial figures are presented in Canadian dollars, unless specified otherwise. Key takeaways from the Q2 2024 financial results were also provided.

news.headline: HANZA's owner buys 174,198 shares, increasing ownership stake. Gerald Engström's Färna Invest AB purchased shares in July.
news.summary: In Stockholm on August 9, 2024, it was reported that Färna Invest AB, the primary owner of HANZA, owned by Gerald Engström, acquired 174,198 shares in HANZA AB in July. This purchase was highlighted in Euroclear's report on the most significant share transactions for HANZA AB during that time. The acquisition by Färna Invest AB is notable, showcasing a substantial investment in the company.

news.headline: Fed's Collins: It's appropriate to begin easing soon if the data is as expected.
Fitch affirms Barclays Bank UK PLC's covered bonds at 'AAA'.
Investors in Five Below, Inc. advised to contact Levi & Korsinsky by Sep 30, 2024, for a class action lawsuit.
news.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has informed investors in Five Below, Inc. (NASDAQ: FIVE) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit is aimed at recovering losses for investors of FIVE who were impacted.

news.headline: Viridien discloses the combined voting rights and shares data.
Shareholders of Roblox Corporation (RBLX) urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by Aug 12, 2024, regarding class action lawsuit for loss recovery.
news.summary: In New York on August 9, 2024, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class-action securities lawsuit for investors in Roblox Corporation (NYSE: RBLX). The class in question includes Roblox investors who suffered losses due to certain actions. The lawsuit aims to recover damages for these investors.

news.headline: Subsea 7 S.A. notified by Barclays Capital Securities Limited on crossing thresholds outlined in Transparency Law.
news.summary: Luxembourg - Subsea 7 S.A. disclosed on 9 August 2024 that Barclays Capital Securities Limited1 notified the company on 8 August 2024 of surpassing the thresholds outlined in Luxembourg’s Transparency Law of 11 January 2008. This law mandates transparency requirements for securities issuers. Subsea 7 S.A. (Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY) confirmed the notification regarding these threshold crossings.

news.headline: Hair care market to grow by $15.25 billion from 2024-2028, with social media and blogging boosting growth, per Technavio.
news.summary: The current report predicts a substantial increase in the worldwide hair care market, with an estimated growth of USD 15.25 billion expected between 2024 and 2028. This growth is projected to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 3.2% over the forecasted period. Factors like social media and blogging are anticipated to play a significant role in influencing this market expansion.

news.headline: Anew Medical, Inc. focuses on treating weight loss and eating disorders with Melanocortin Receptor Binding Peptides.
news.summary: ANEW MEDICAL, INC. is focusing on a neurological method to address weight loss and eating disorders by using peptides that bind to melanocortin receptors. This innovative approach could offer promising results for individuals struggling with these issues. The company aims to leverage this technology to provide effective treatment options for the growing number of people affected by weight-related conditions. With an estimated 1 in 3 adults in the United States classified as obese and over 30 million individuals suffering from eating disorders, the potential impact of this research is significant. ANEW MEDICAL, INC. is committed to advancing this novel approach to medical treatment and improving the lives of those affected by these conditions.

news.headline: Europe Sentiment: Risk Sentiment Continues to Improve - FJELite
TITAN ARMY launches new high-speed gaming monitors; offers 240Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, and 2K resolution.
news.summary: In Berlin on August 9, 2024, the renowned e-sports monitor brand TITAN ARMY introduced a new line of gaming monitors offering exceptional smoothness, clarity, and gaming performance. The lineup includes the P2510S, P32A2S2, and C32C1S models, boasting 240Hz refresh rates, 1ms GTG response times, and 2K image quality. These monitors promise top-tier performance for gamers seeking an immersive experience.

news.headline: Vitalik Buterin transferred $8 million in Ether to a new wallet; potential donation in the works?
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the economy grew by 2.5% last quarter, exceeding the expected 2% growth. This increase in economic growth was driven by a surge in consumer spending, which rose by 4.3% during the same period. Additionally, the unemployment rate fell to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The stock market also saw significant gains, with the main index climbing by 5% in the last month. Overall, these positive indicators suggest a strong and growing economy with optimistic prospects for the future.

news.headline: BTC price faces 'death cross' risk if $62K resistance not overcome, history suggests downside ahead.
news.summary: Bitcoin is on the verge of experiencing a daily chart "death cross," despite this, the $62,000 resistance level may play a crucial role in preventing further declines in the BTC price, as history has shown.

news.headline: Turkey witnesses a rise in crypto license requests as companies flock to the growing industry amidst upcoming regulations.
news.summary: The crypto economy in Turkey is set to expand significantly, with both local and international companies demonstrating strong interest in the sector due to the upcoming new regulations. The growth potential is substantial, as evidenced by the increasing number of companies actively participating in the market. This trend is expected to lead to a surge in investments and development within Turkey's crypto economy, creating opportunities for significant economic growth in the near future.

news.headline: 'Supreme Court rulings favor 'Regulated Community' post three key decisions last month, sparking discussions.'
news.summary: Following three rulings by the Supreme Court last month, a common phrase used in various industries to indicate compliance with regulatory mandates has gained popularity.

news.headline: Researchers estimate that around 400 million people globally have experienced Long Covid, costing the economy about $1 trillion annually.
news.summary: A recent report suggests that the condition has placed a notable burden on both patients and society, with a global economic impact estimated to be around $1 trillion annually.

news.headline: Wall Street cautious after volatile week. Investors wary as signs of slowing growth could trigger stock plunge.
news.summary: Investors are now faced with a new consideration in addition to the inflation rate. The potential impact of any indication of slowing economic growth on stock performance is a crucial factor to watch. This raises concerns about the possibility of stocks plummeting in response to any signs of economic stagnation.

news.headline: Using rental car transponders can result in expensive toll fees. Look for alternatives like apps or mail payments.
news.summary: Utilizing the rental company’s transponder could result in substantial fees; however, there are alternative methods available to avoid excessive charges. This can include utilizing apps or opting to pay via mail, offering more cost-effective solutions for customers.

news.headline: Are rising Disney theme park prices and complex tools worth it? Fans reconsider as tickets and hotel costs soar.
news.summary: Disney has recently increased the prices of tickets and hotel accommodations at its theme parks. This, coupled with the introduction of expensive and complex planning tools, has left many of its devoted fans questioning the feasibility of their upcoming vacations.

news.headline: Stay calm during market turmoil. Prepare for potential losses. Stay invested for long-term gains. #InvestingAdvice
news.summary: Prepare yourself for a possible storm by ensuring you are well positioned. It is important to remain resilient and stay committed for the long term.

news.headline: Education Cannot Wait is providing $12 million in Colombia to aid 780,000 children affected by various crises, bringing total funding to $28 million.
news.summary: A significant number of children, totaling more than 780,000, are currently not receiving an education due to a combination of factors including migration, armed conflict, internal displacement, and climate change. An initiative led by the Norwegian Refugee Council and UNICEF, in collaboration with the Government of Colombia and local organizations, aims to address this issue.

news.headline: Tuniu, a Chinese travel company (Nasdaq: TOUR), gets minimum bid price notice from Nasdaq, August 9, 2024.
news.summary: In Nanjing, China, on August 9, 2024, Tuniu Corporation (Nasdaq: TOUR), a prominent online leisure travel company in China, revealed that it has been informed in writing by the Nasdaq Stock Listing Qualifications Department regarding a certain matter.

news.headline: MINISO Group to announce June quarter and interim results on Aug 30, 2024. Stock symbols: NYSE: MNSO, HKEX: 9896.
news.summary: Guangzhou, China, August 9, 2024 - MINISO Group Holding Limited (NYSE: MNSO; HKEX: 9896), a well-known global value retailer known for its trendy lifestyle products inspired by intellectual property (IP) designs, has revealed its intention to unveil the financial results for the year 2024.

Italian International Trade Balance Actual 5.065B (Forecast -, Previous 6.430B)
Italian Trade Balance EU Actual -1.045B (Forecast -, Previous 0.524B)
Invenio Imaging enrolls first patients in US pivotal study of AI module for lung cancer. Aug.9, 2024.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on August 9, 2024, Invenio Imaging, a prominent company specializing in intraoperative fresh tissue imaging and artificial intelligence, revealed the initiation of the enrollment of the initial patients in a pivotal study in the United States focused on their AI-powered image analysis module designed for detecting lung cancer.

news.headline: Starlizard Integrity Services flags 79 suspicious football matches globally in 2024's first half, 21.5% in one country; CONMEBOL sees 200% surge.
news.summary: A significant concentration of 21.5% of questionable matches occurred within a single country, indicating a notable rise of 200% in suspicious matches within the CONMEBOL region. Furthermore, there has been a nearly twofold increase in matches displaying irregularities specifically in first-half-only betting markets. These findings were reported by sports integrity experts at Starlizard, based in London, on August 9, 2024.
